name: Ultimechs Spectator
short_description: View and stream Ultimechs matches with broadcast-quality tools so that your audience never has to miss a moment of the action! Built with streamers and esports fans in mind, Ultimechs Spectator lets PC owners keep an eye on the action in one of VR’s hottest competitive games.
detailed_description:
Streamers and sports fans alike can now view Ultimechs matches from the comfort of their PC with the Ultimechs Spectator App!

Created with the audience perspective in mind, the Ultimechs Spectator app gives users access to helpful broadcast tools designed to enhance the viewing experience.

Features:
  • Spectate specific matches using Ultimechs' party system
  • Choose from multiple camera angles to follow the action in the best way possible
  • Access broadcast-quality overlays including selected match timer, score and more

Want to be the star of the show as well as a streamer? Be sure to add the full Ultimechs experience to your Steam Library today!
